prompt: Tap the right flop slot to complete board context check.
why_v1: Both flop context and position define c-bet defaults.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The right flop card completes all three flop cards, so read it first. You need that full flop picture before deciding whether the board is dry or coordinated and whether this flop is dry enough for a c-bet or coordinated enough for a check.
